name: Spinach Kathy Pitts' Way+
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Spinach, washed, stems removed (still wet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear the larger spinach leaves in two.
2. Wash the spinach well to remove any grit.
3. Heat olive oil in a large frying pan with a lid.
4. When the oil is hot, add the minced garlic.
5. Add the spinach to the pan and cover.
6. Occasionally shake the pan (as if popping popcorn).
7. Cook for 3-4 minutes until the spinach is wilted, tender, and well seasoned.
- You can add more salt and pepper as desired.
8. Serve immediately.
